title: Implement retry with doubling backoff and injectable sleep
prompt: Create retry.mjs exporting async retry(fn, { attempts = 3, baseMs = 100, sleep }). Call fn(); on rejection wait baseMs, then 2*baseMs, ... between attempts using the injectable sleep(ms). If all attempts fail, rethrow the last error.

grade.command: node -e "import('./retry.mjs').then(async m=>{let n=0;const delays=[];const fn=async()=>{n++;if(n<3)throw new Error('nope');return 'yes'};const r=await m.retry(fn,{attempts:3,baseMs:100,sleep:async(ms)=>{delays.push(ms)}});if(r!=='yes'||n!==3)throw new Error('retry');if(delays.join(',')!=='100,200')throw new Error(delays.join(','));let threw=false;try{await m.retry(async()=>{throw new Error('always')},{attempts:2,baseMs:1,sleep:async()=>{}})}catch(e){threw=e.message==='always'}if(!threw)throw new Error('rethrow');console.log('ok')})"
